sports.title: Former Cardinals head coach, Titans assistant McGinnis dies - ESPN
sports.description: Former Tennessee assistant Dave McGinnis, who also served as head coach for the Arizona Cardinals in a decorated career on the NFL sidelines, died at 74 on Monday with his family by his side at Ascension St. Thomas Midtown Hospital, the Titans announced.
